title: asemeia hebeclada var. hebeclada
intro: Asemeia hebeclada var. hebeclada, also known as the 'false passion flower', is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the Passifloraceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Asemeia hebeclada var. hebeclada include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
